calendar.title: Appointments Schedule
calendar.subtitle: Manage your schedule, reminders and optimize your stylists' time.

clients.title: Clients Management
clients.subtitle: Centralized database of your clients and patients.
clients.search: Search by name, email or phone…

services.title: Services Management
services.subtitle: Configure the treatments and prices you offer.
services.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this service?

team.title: Staff Management
team.subtitle: Track individual revenue, automatic commission settlement and retention rankings.

finances.title: ERP Financial Control Center
finances.subtitle: Comprehensive multi-branch accounting, reconciliation and real-time liquidity audits.

inventory.title: ERP Inventory Control Center
inventory.subtitle: Automated supply control, FIFO batch traceability, ROI calculation per use and replenishment.

workflows.title: Automation Center (ERP Workflows)
workflows.subtitle: Design, simulate and launch conditional business flows for your salon, clinic or studio.

automations.title: Automation Center
automations.subtitle: Connect your favorite tools and automate communication.

whatsapp.name: Automatic WhatsApp
whatsapp.desc: Send confirmations and reminders via WhatsApp.

push.name: Push Notifications
push.desc: Direct alerts to your clients' mobile devices.

bot.name: 24/7 Booking Bot
bot.desc: An AI assistant that books appointments for you.

automations.comingSoonDesc: Book appointments directly from your social media with our official booking button.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Field catalog, screen assignment, workflow rules and active modules.
settings.noPermission: You do not have permissions to view configurations.

workflowHint.title: Workflows with transitions and screens
workflowHint.p1: In Workflows you can define transitions between steps and intermediate screens (forms that the user or client fills out during the flow). The screens use fields from the catalog with entity workflow.
workflowHint.p2: First configure the fields in the "Catalog" tab and assign them in "Workflow — screens" if you want to customize what is shown at each step.

sheetsSync.title: Google Sheets Sync
sheetsSync.subtitle: Two-way accounting portal to import, export and download files from your business.
sheetsSync.connectLocalTitle: Upload a Local File of Appointments, Clients or Services
sheetsSync.dataTypePlaceholder: Select the type of sheet or info you want to import.
sheetsSync.googleUrlLabel: 2. URL of the Google Sheets spreadsheet
sheetsSync.googleUrlHint: Ensure the spreadsheet has permissions "Anyone with the link can view" in Google Drive. If your sheet has multiple tabs, copy the link while inside the specific tab.
sheetsSync.uploadFileDrag: Select or drag your file here
sheetsSync.uploadFileFormats: Supported formats: Excel (.xlsx, .xls), CSV (.csv) and JSON (.json)
sheetsSync.howItWorksDesc: We designed this tool so you don't have to change how you work. If you keep your records in Excel or Google Sheets, you can upload them directly into the company database without losing any historical data.
sheetsSync.noHistoryLossDesc: Preserves clinical history, chemical notes for hair color/nails, and the total spent by your clients.
sheetsSync.instantMetricsDesc: When the sync is finished, your KPI widgets, commission charts, and AI Insights will populate automatically.
sheetsSync.flexibleMappingDesc: No matter the names of your columns. You can map multiple fields freely to the company layout.
sheetsSync.sheetAnalyzedDesc: Headers and data extracted correctly. Map the columns below to continue.
sheetsSync.neonProcessingNotice: Neon Processing: We are validating, linking references and omitting availability constraints on historical appointments from previous months safely.
sheetsSync.importSuccessDesc: Your company database has been updated with the historical data from your Google Sheets.
sheetsSync.outputConfigDesc: Select which Neon PostgreSQL database you need to sync or download to your device.
sheetsSync.syncingOutDesc: Exporting selected data to Google Drive cloud storage.
sheetsSync.syncOutSuccessDesc: The data file with all details of {{type}} has been downloaded automatically.
sheetsSync.syncOutSuccessActionHint: You can open a clean sheet in Google Sheets using the button below and import the downloaded file.
sheetsSync.exporterContableDesc: Generated files are natively compatible with Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, LibreOffice and Numbers. The structure meets the accounting guidelines of Salon Aura Studio.

errors.selectColumn: Please select at least one column to export.
errors.neonQuery: Could not query real data from Neon PostgreSQL.
errors.emptyCsv: The CSV file is empty or does not have valid data.
errors.emptyExcel: The Excel file is empty or does not have valid data.
errors.invalidJson: The JSON file must contain an array of objects.
errors.errorJson: Error processing JSON file. Verify that it is a valid format.
errors.unsupportedFormat: File format not supported. Upload a .csv, .xlsx, .xls or .json file.
errors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid Google Sheets URL.
errors.notGoogleUrl: The URL does not seem to be a valid Google Sheets link. Check that it has the correct format.
errors.fetchError: Error connecting with Google Sheets. Ensure it is set to public.
errors.missingMapping: The following required columns must be mapped: {{missing}}
errors.postgreError: An error occurred while loading data into PostgreSQL.

progressText.step1: Structuring headers and compiling relational records...
progressText.step2: Opening secure OAuth2 tunnel with Google Drive API...
progressText.step3: Transferring cells to the Google Sheets server...
progressText.import2: Downloading full sheet and analyzing data rows...
progressText.import3: Preparing local file rows for import...
progressText.import4: Processing and saving relational data in database...

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.heroSubtitle: Learn to manage your business like the world's best companies. A complete guide for owners, admins and teams.

section1.title: What is Dashboard OS?
section1.body: It's the definitive operating system for service-based businesses. We centralize your schedule, finances and clients in a single premium interface designed for speed and clarity.

section2.title: Everything one click away
section2.card1Desc: Visual control of daily, weekly and monthly bookings.
section2.card2Desc: Revenue and occupancy KPIs updated instantly.
section2.card3Desc: Control performance and schedules of your entire team.

section3.title: The success cycle
section3.step1Desc: Register basic data and client preferences.
section3.step2Desc: Pick service, worker and time on the calendar.
section3.step3Desc: The system records the payment and updates your finances.

section4.title: Next-level Automation
section4.body: Reduce no-shows by 40% with automatic WhatsApp and Email reminders. The system handles follow-ups while you focus on the service.
section4.preview: "Hi [Name], this is a reminder for your [Service] appointment tomorrow at [Time]. See you soon!"

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I customize my colors?
faq.a1: Go to Settings > Brand. Pick your color and the dashboard will adapt automatically.
faq.a2: Yes, all your client and finance lists can be exported to Excel or PDF in one click.

footer.title: Ready to scale?
footer.subtitle: Dashboard OS is designed to grow with you.

empty.title: Create your first automation flow
empty.subtitle: Set up real-time triggers (appointments, stock, payments) and branch dynamic decisions to send WhatsApps, emails, or team tasks.

builder.errorFields: Please complete the name, trigger, and at least one action.
builder.canvasHelp: Drag nodes to move. Connect nodes by dragging line between them.

cita-finalizada.name: 🏁 Appointment Finished
cita-finalizada.desc: Triggers when marking appointment as done.

consentimiento-firmado.name: ✍️ Consent Signature
consentimiento-firmado.desc: Triggers when consent is successfully signed.

cliente-inactivo.name: ⚠️ Inactive Client
cliente-inactivo.desc: Triggers when client has no visits for 60d.

stock-bajo.name: 📦 Low Stock
stock-bajo.desc: Triggers when stock crosses minimum level.

whatsapp.name: 📱 WhatsApp
whatsapp.desc: Sends a message via WhatsApp link.

email.name: ✉️ Email Message
email.desc: Sends a formal email via Gmail API.

enviar-consentimiento.name: 📑 Send Consent
enviar-consentimiento.desc: Generates and sends consent request link by email.

enviar-comprobante.name: 🧾 Send Receipt
enviar-comprobante.desc: Sends a digital payment receipt by email.

inspector.title: Node Inspector
inspector.empty: Select a node on the canvas to configure its parameters, thresholds, conditions, and automations.
inspector.tipBody: You can reference dynamic salon variables in any text field in the workflow. They will be computed automatically before execution.

logs.title: Audit & Execution Ledger (Logs)
logs.subtitle: Track each automation in real-time with processing times and response logs.
logs.empty: No registered executions found in the ledger.
logs.emptyTrace: No detailed sub-logs for this execution.

simulator.title: Live Workflow Simulator
simulator.subtitle: Simulate live salon events to test automation logic and watch branches traverse the canvas.

unauthorized.title: Restricted Access
unauthorized.subtitle: You do not have sufficient permissions to access this section.
unauthorized.description: Your current role in the business does not possess the privileges required to view this content. If you believe this is an error, please contact the account administrator or owner.

rolesPermissions.title: Business Roles & Permissions
rolesPermissions.subtitle: Manage staff access levels, assign roles to collaborators, and define which actions and modules they can view or operate.

stats.dirtyDesc: ⚠️ You have unapplied changes in the matrix

table.cannotDeleteTooltip: Cannot delete because it has assigned users or you lack permission.

rolesPermissions.matrixDesc: Check or uncheck boxes by module to assign or revoke bulk access.
rolesPermissions.noPermsFound: No permissions matching the search were found.

dirtyMatrixBar.title: Unsaved changes in the permissions matrix
dirtyMatrixBar.desc: You have modified permissions in the matrix. Save changes to apply them to collaborators in real-time.

modal.descPlaceholder: What permissions or operations this role performs...
modal.createDesc: Define a new access level. Its unique key will be auto-generated based on the name.
modal.editDesc: Modify the name or description of the role. System predefined roles cannot be altered.
modal.duplicateDesc: Generates an identical copy of this role. All matrix assigned permissions will be atomically cloned to the new role.

staff.title: Staff Role Assignment
staff.desc: Registered collaborators who have access to the accounting/operational dashboard. You can reassign their roles dynamically.
staff.invitationsDesc: Invitations sent by email that have not yet been accepted by the recipient.

customPerm.title: Register Custom Permission
customPerm.desc: If you are developing new features in Dashboard OS, you can register a granular action here to control it in the matrix above.
customPerm.actionHint: Must be a unique lowercase identifier separated by dots. E.g., module.action.
customPerm.moduleHint: The module name will group the permission row in the visual access matrix.
customPerm.descPlaceholder: Briefly explain what this permission restricts...

errors.roleInUse: You cannot delete the role '{{name}}' because it has {{count}} user(s) assigned.
errors.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the role '{{name}}'?

success.matrixUpdated: Permissions matrix updated and successfully synchronized with the database.
success.roleDuplicated: Role duplicated successfully with all its permissions.
success.roleDeleted: The role '{{name}}' has been deleted successfully.
